name: Evergreen Farmers Market THE ORIGINAL

Products.value: Fresh-picked organic and conventional produce, Palisade fruit, fresh flowers and hanging baskets, handmade pies, honey, Italian foods, bread, gourmet mushrooms, coffee, Austrian pastries, and Middle Eastern food at the market cafe

notes: On-file website (coloradooutdoormarkets.com, operated by Colorado Outdoor Markets LLC) is confirmed correct/official for 'The Original' Evergreen Farmers' Market at Church of the Cross, 28253 Meadow Drive (matches on-file address, so not updated). The live site is JS-rendered and would not return readable content via fetch tools, so hours/season/products were corroborated via the Downtown Evergreen business listing (which links directly to this market's official site) and confirmed via search-indexed snippets of the official site itself. Season is stated elsewhere as roughly June 2 - Sept 29, condensed here to month names. Could not confirm SNAP/EBT acceptance, email, phone, ADA accessibility, or organic certification from any official source. IMPORTANT AMBIGUITY: Evergreen has at least two separate farmers markets - this one ('The Original', Church of the Cross/Hiwan Park) and a distinct 'Evergreen Farmers Market' at the Center for the Arts / Bergen Village (with its own Facebook page facebook.com/farmersmarketevergreen, Instagram @_the_evergreen_farmers_market_, phone 303-884-8735). Those contact details were NOT included here because they appear to belong to the other (non-original) market, not this one, and could not be verified as applying to this listing.
